From Yankee Stadium to Joyce Kilmer Park, our team has protected Grand Concourse properties for years, understanding the specific pest pressures faced by buildings along this 4.5-mile thoroughfare.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Grand Concourse?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal services throughout Grand Concourse. Most wasp nest eliminations are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. Emergency services are available for nests near entrances or high-traffic areas of your property.

faqs.question: What determines the cost between $350 and $550 for wasp removal?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, height requirements, and the number of nests present. Ground-level nests in accessible areas typically cost $350, while nests in high eaves, wall voids, or requiring ladder work may cost up to $550. We provide free estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are wasp removal treatments safe for Grand Concourse apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products specifically chosen for multi-family buildings and urban environments. Our technicians take extra precautions in apartment complexes to protect residents, pets, and the building structure while completely eliminating wasp colonies.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your wasp removal service in the Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a 30-day warranty on all wasp removal services in Grand Concourse. If wasps return to the same nest location within 30 days, we'll re-treat at no additional charge. We also offer preventative treatments to keep wasps from rebuilding in the same spots.
